leadership.name: Joseph Oppong Cudjoe
leadership.title: Director
leadership.bio: Joseph Oppong Cudjoe is a founding Director of Reliance Oil Limited, providing strategic direction and governance to ensure the company's growth and compliance with Ghana's petroleum regulations.

leadership.name: Djamong Kwesi Atta
leadership.title: Director
leadership.bio: Djamong Kwesi Atta serves as a Director of Reliance Oil Limited, contributing to the company's strategic planning and corporate governance framework.

leadership.name: Charles Blay Kodwo
leadership.title: Deputy Director
leadership.bio: Charles Blay Kodwo serves as Deputy Director, supporting the board in overseeing operations, compliance, and business development across all regions.

leadership.name: Emmanuel Asare Blankson
leadership.title: Secretary
leadership.bio: Emmanuel Asare Blankson serves as Company Secretary, responsible for corporate compliance, board communications, and legal documentation.
